description: PM agent periodic issue polling for AutoRAG Research.

tasks.name: Poll GitHub Issues Every 15 Minutes
tasks.description: Fetch open issues and process newly seen issues for triage.
tasks.prompt:
Run GitHub issue polling for AutoRAG Research.

1. Call gh_issue_list for repo "autorag-research" with state "open".
2. Parse the returned list using fields: number, title, body, labels, state.
3. Ensure /workspace/group/seen_issues.json exists (create with [] if missing).
4. Load seen issue numbers from /workspace/group/seen_issues.json.
5. Compute new issues = currently open issue numbers not in seen list.
6. For each new issue:
   - produce triage assessment: scope, risk, missing context, implementation readiness (ready|needs-details)
   - post gh_issue_comment acknowledging the issue with the triage summary and next step
   - write_secondbrain_insight with type "pm-insight" including issue number/title/body/labels/state + triage decision
7. Update /workspace/group/seen_issues.json with all currently open issue numbers.
8. Send a short Slack update: count of new issues processed, issue numbers, and readiness split.

Comment template:
"Thanks for opening this issue. I ran an initial PM triage.\n\n## Initial Assessment\n- Scope: ...\n- Risk: ...\n- Missing context: ...\n- Implementation readiness: ready|needs-details\n\n## Next Step\n- ..."

SecondBrain template requirements:
- type: pm-insight
- source: pm-autorag
- project: autorag-research
- title: Issue #<number> triage: <title>
- tags: [github-issue, triage]
- links: include issue URL
- content: issue summary + triage decision + next action
